Innovation.description: Mobile app booking/fleet management; online reservations; Preferred loyalty; digital receipts; fleet tech integration.

Customer Support.description: Phone (0861 02 01 19), app, online. Reviews mixed: efficient for standard but poor at disputes/billing.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available; national reach; no specific POPIA violations. Standard car rental data practices; website accessible.
